## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Link any related issues (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / maintenance
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI / build changes

## Screenshots

<!-- For UI changes, add before/after screenshots. Delete if not applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Follows the project code style (no `any`, immutable updates, logical CSS)
- [ ] i18n keys added for any new user-facing strings (en **and** ar)
- [ ] RTL layout verified for UI changes
- [ ] No `console.log` (uses `@/lib/logger`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
